content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.swarm.dkg
FILE: cosmos/core/swarm/dkg.py (103 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Decentralized Knowledge Graph (DKG).

"Our thoughts are not just ours; they belong to the Collective."

This module enables trust-less synchronization of knowledge entities across 
P2P nodes. It uses a CRDT-inspired conflict resolution strategy.

CLASSES:
- GraphEdge
- GraphNode
- DecentralizedKnowledgeGraph: State-replicated Graph for the Swarm.
  Methods: def add_fact(self, source: str, relation: str, target: str, properties: dict={})
  Methods: def create_sync_fragment(self) -> str
  Methods: def merge_fragment(self, fragment_json: str)
  Methods: def get_neighbors(self, node_id: str) -> list[Tuple[str, str]]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def save_dkg(graph: DecentralizedKnowledgeGraph, path: str)
